Purpose: User authentication and session bootstrap
Key Responsibilities: JWT login, logout, /me identity check, password hashing via bcrypt

Purpose: Multi-tenant organization management for superadmins
Key Responsibilities: List/create/edit/delete organizations; cross-org user CRUD (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /:id/users); admin elevation; org-context switching

Purpose: Container management for contact rosters
Key Responsibilities: CRUD on contact_lists; manage per-list attribute (field) definitions; list-scoped read endpoints

Purpose: One-shot import of contacts from cloud object storage
Key Responsibilities: Pulls CSV from S3/GCS/Azure/SFTP; streams + parses; validates rows; bulk inserts via COPY; reports per-batch errors

Purpose: Stored credentials + cron schedule for recurring cloud imports
Key Responsibilities: CRUD on cloud_import_configs; computeNextRun helper consumed by the scheduler; encrypts secrets at rest

Purpose: Single / bulk contact ingestion and per-contact mutations
Key Responsibilities: POST bulk JSON; multipart CSV upload (streamed via pg-copy-streams); validateContact against field defs; PATCH /:id; DELETE /:id (cleans CCS / history / sessions in a tx); dnc-check; upload-batch status

Purpose: Reusable global field definitions shared across contact lists
Key Responsibilities: CRUD on field_library; allowed_to_all toggle; data_type/field_type taxonomy

Purpose: Campaign definitions and their linked metadata
Key Responsibilities: CRUD on campaigns; attach contact lists; attach DNC groups (campaign_dnc_groups); attach disposition code sets; per-campaign reports surface

Purpose: Country/region holiday calendars used by schedule windows
Key Responsibilities: CRUD on holiday_calendars + their rules; consumed at scheduling-window evaluation time

Purpose: Bridges agent browser to FreeSWITCH
Key Responsibilities: GET /sip-credentials — lazily provisions and returns extension/password + WSS URL for the in-browser softphone (sip.js)

Purpose: Top-level Do-Not-Call grouping per org
Key Responsibilities: CRUD on dnc_groups; rolls up list_count + number_count; lists campaigns referencing each group

Purpose: Sub-grouping under a DNC group with a source tag
Key Responsibilities: CRUD on dnc_lists (manual / import / agent_disposition / campaign_specific); POST /:id/numbers bulk-adds and propagates to campaign_contact_status (sets status='dnc' on matching active rows)

Purpose: Per-number edit and delete inside a DNC list
Key Responsibilities: PATCH /:id (phone/reason/notes); DELETE /:id; org-scope verified through parent group

Purpose: Reusable time-of-day / day-of-week dial windows
Key Responsibilities: CRUD on schedule_templates + schedule_windows; timezone-aware; consumed by jobs at fetch time

Purpose: Campaign execution instances (a 'run' of a campaign)
Key Responsibilities: List/create campaign_jobs; status transitions; ties contact_list_id + schedule_template_id + campaign_id together; surfaces queue counts per status

Purpose: Outcome taxonomy applied at end of call
Key Responsibilities: CRUD on disposition_codes; per-org library; can mark a code as completion or retry

Purpose: Aggregated analytics endpoints
Key Responsibilities: Per-campaign KPI rollups (attempted / connected / completed / dnc / avg timings); interaction-log feed used by the frontend Reports page

Purpose: User management for the 'agent' (and admin/supervisor) roles
Key Responsibilities: GET / POST / PATCH / DELETE on users scoped to current org; admin / self-delete guards; role elevation rules

Purpose: Live agent presence and current-contact lookups
Key Responsibilities: GET endpoints surface online agents + their current contact and job. Mutating ready/heartbeat/offline endpoints live in backend-queue

Purpose: Catalogue of IANA timezones
Key Responsibilities: GET list — populated from Intl.supportedValuesOf('timeZone') by seedTimezones on boot

Purpose: Polls cloud-import schedules and fires due imports
Key Responsibilities: setInterval every CLOUD_IMPORT_CHECK_INTERVAL_SECONDS; atomically claims due cloud_import_configs by advancing next_refresh, then invokes runCloudImport; writes last_run_status / last_run_error

Purpose: Subscribes to FreeSWITCH channel events
Key Responsibilities: Reads sip_h_X-Interaction-Id correlation header; writes answered_at / disconnected_at / fs_uuid / call_status / recording_url back into contact_interactions so call lifecycle is captured even if the browser disconnects mid-call

Purpose: JWT verification and request user injection
Key Responsibilities: Parses Bearer token; loads req.user (userId, orgId, role); honours X-Org-Context header for superadmin org switching

Purpose: Role-based access control
Key Responsibilities: Wraps handlers to assert req.user.role; superadmin auto-allowed on every gated route

Purpose: Centralised error to HTTP mapping
Key Responsibilities: AppError -> statusCode + message; Postgres 23505 -> 409 (unique), 23503 -> 404 (FK), 23514 -> 400 (check); 500 fallback with stderr log

Purpose: Applies SQL files in backend/migrations/ in order
Key Responsibilities: Sequential .sql execution against the configured pool

Purpose: Postgres connection pool and transaction helper
Key Responsibilities: Singleton pg.Pool; withTransaction(cb) BEGIN/COMMIT/ROLLBACK helper used by mutating handlers

Purpose: Optional one-off baseline data load
Key Responsibilities: Demo organisations / users / templates for a fresh dev install

Purpose: Idempotent System-org + superadmin user creation
Key Responsibilities: Ensures the platform always has at least one login even on a fresh DB

Purpose: Populates timezones table from Intl
Key Responsibilities: Runs once if table is empty; safe to re-run

Purpose: Populates default reusable field definitions
Key Responsibilities: Idempotent insert of standard fields (first_name, last_name, email, etc.) marked allowed_to_all

Purpose: Agent marks self available and selects jobs to dial
Key Responsibilities: Sets agent_sessions.status='available' + selected_job_ids; validates job ownership against agent's org; refreshes login_at on a fresh switch from offline

Purpose: Liveness ping from the agent UI
Key Responsibilities: Updates agent_sessions.last_heartbeat_at = NOW(); recovery loop uses this column to detect dead sessions

Purpose: Agent explicitly goes offline
Key Responsibilities: Sets status='offline' + logout_at; releases any held CCS lock so the contact is immediately re-queueable

Purpose: Atomic dispatcher: hands the next dialable contact to the agent
Key Responsibilities: Single transactional SELECT...FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED across campaign_contact_status filtered by session.selected_job_ids, schedule windows, holiday calendars, DNC, priority, next_attempt_at, and the DIALER_MIN_REDIAL_MINUTES floor; flips status='with_agent', stamps locked_by_session, and opens a contact_interactions row with given_at

Purpose: Agent declines a preview before dialing
Key Responsibilities: Validates rejection code from REJECTION_CODES; releases CCS lock; records rejected_at on the open interaction; bumps attempts_made and re-schedules next_attempt_at

Purpose: Single final UPDATE that closes a call
Key Responsibilities: Writes disposition_code + timings (talk_time / wrap-up / total_handling) to contact_interactions; transitions CCS to completed | exhausted | dnc | queued depending on disposition flags; auto-adds number to a campaign_specific DNC list when disposition is dnc-flagged

Purpose: Reclaims sessions and locks abandoned by dead agents
Key Responsibilities: setInterval every HEARTBEAT_CHECK_INTERVAL_SECONDS; in a single tx: marks sessions with stale last_heartbeat_at as offline, frees CCS locks they held (re-queues with a 5-minute cooldown), and closes orphan open contact_interactions rows

Purpose: JWT verification (mirror of the backend's middleware)
Key Responsibilities: Same Bearer-token parsing + req.user injection; runs locally so the queue service is independently deployable

Purpose: Centralised error to HTTP mapping
Key Responsibilities: Same PG-code mapping as the main backend; ensures 23505 / 23503 / 23514 surface as 409 / 404 / 400 instead of 500

Purpose: Dedicated pg.Pool for the queue process
Key Responsibilities: Separate connection pool from the main backend so dispatch latency is not affected by long-running admin queries; withTransaction helper used by next-contact / disposition
